testcase.name: agent can reserve its own parking slot when station parking is full()
reconcile keeps reservation while agent is busy in transit to reserved hub()
multi-slot cannot exceed capacity plus overbook margin()
re-reserve switches ephemeral waiter to a freed real slot()
full station rejects reserve when ephemeral is not allowed()
reservation is kept while agent is busy in flight to reserved hub()
multi-slot station allows one ephemeral when real slots are full()
reserve is exclusive per slot index like task claim()
single-slot cannot exceed capacity plus overbook margin()
overbook allows ephemeral reservation when capacity is full()
reservation is released when agent leaves hub with null current station()
ephemeral promotes to freed slot index on multi-slot station()
snapshot keeps return reservation on correct index when dock registry is cleared()
snapshot exposes ephemeral waiter for parking load()
confirm occupancy on second pad while peer occupies first pad()
ephemeral reservation promotes when occupant leaves hub()
